🔍 The Visibility Gap

What AI agents surface vs. what most PMM teams produce

How to Play

Drag each content type to the correct column: things AI agents can process (green) or things they skip entirely (red). Sort all 10 to complete the challenge!

Sorted: 0 / 10
The Visibility Gap is not a technology problem — it is a prioritization problem.
